calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admission And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF THOMAS CHILDS' Motion For Order Establishing Admission And For Monetary Sanctions. Unless responses are received prior to the hearing, motion is granted as to both defendants without sanctions. If responses are received, the motion is denied and sanctions of $750 are awarded jointly and severally to both defendants. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Supplemental Interrogatories And Request For Production To Defendants And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF THOMAS CHILDS' Motion To Compel Answers To Supplemental Interrogatories And Request For Production To Defendants And For Monetary Sanctions. As to the discovery at issue at this time, said defendants have no additional information or documents to supplement their prior responses. No sanctions awarded. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
